creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
^Triage: 

- [tags] in issue Titles are deprecated
- Security and bugfix releases, MFH
- Pending VuXML Entry (probably), for:

  - Issue 903 - Use-after-free vulnerability in memory pools during data transfer.
  - Issue 902 - Out-of-bounds read in mod_cap getstateflags() function.  This
    has been addressed by updating the bundled version of libcap. (did not check for CVE's, but may be available)
